titleStmt.title: SII 7.246: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 246. (A.R. No. 70 of 1901). ON ANOTHER SLAB SET UP IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ . jiyyā
t trailōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . svasti śrī . jayābhyudaya śaka
varuṣa 1379 neya Īśvarasaṁvatsarada kārttikaśuddha pāḍya budhavāra
daṁdu śrīmatkuṁḍakuṁdānvaya panaśōkāvalīśvaradē śigaṇāgragaṇya
rumappa śrīmanmaladhārilalitakīrtibhaṭṭārakadēvarugaḷa śiṣyaraha Ari
rāyara gaṁḍaradāvaṇi paṭṭipoṁbucapuravarādhīśvararuṁ padmāva
tīdēvilabdhavaraprasādaruṁ jinadattarāyānvayavārdhivardhanakararumappa
śrīmadabhinavapāṁḍyadēvaOḍeyaru pṛthvīrājyaṁgeyyuttamiralu
seṭṭayabaḷiya saṁjaraḍahana Aḷiya saṁjiseṭṭi Ā pāṁḍyadēva[Oḍe]
yara kāruṇyadiṁ taṁna mūlada tabagoḷiya beṭṭina bayala catu
ssīmeyiṁda nēmināthasvāmiya caityālayadalli kārtika śuddha pāḍyadalu śrīpāṁ
ḍyadēvaOḍeyara hesarinalu dēvariṁge māḍisuva Abhiṣēkapūjege saluva
bhattakha 4 nityahāladhārege naḍasuva bhatta kha 12 pratitiṁgaḷoṁdakkaṁ naḍasu
raOṁdu pāriśvadēvara hūdōṭaku tōṭigagu saha kaṭṭiṁmariya O
loḷage gadde Oṁdu . neṭṭiṁgaḷiyadalu Āṭhāvige saluva catussīmeyoḷa
ge guṁmaṭadēvarige Amṛtapaḍige pāṁḍyadēva Oḍeyaru Āṭhāvina si
ddhāya modalādavanu biṭu prativaruṣa naḍava hāge māḍida dharmaśāsa
na kha 24 Ā ṭhāviṁda Oḍeyara nirūpadiṁda pāriśvadēvarige saṁjaraseṭṭi
nityahāladhārege māḍida bhatta kha 24 Amṛtapaḍige bhatta kha 16 mu
dalu tanage saluva koṭṭarāḍiya ṭhāviṁda naṁdādīvigu nityapūje
gu saha naḍasuva teṁgineṁṇeya hāḍa 4 Udayade pūjege Eṁṇe
ya hāḍa mukkālu . yiṁtī dharmmagaḷanu tappade naḍasi A saṁjaraseṭṭi yāta
na saṁtānadavaru Ā ṭhāvugaḷanu Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyigaḷāgi bhōgisi
varige naḍasi baha sīme Allade Osage Anyāya Anucita salladeṁdu pāṁḍyadē
va Oḍeyaru barasikoṭṭa śāsanada patra . Ī dharmmaṁgaḷige tappidavaru vāra
ṇāsiyalli paṁcamahāpātakava māḍida pāsakku ta(ṁ)mma kuṭuṁ
da pāpakke hōharu . dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānācchrēyōnu pālanaṁ .
dānātsvarggamavāpnōti pālanādaccutaṁ padaṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā
yō haraiccha vasuṁdhare . ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kri
mi .
Digital edition of SII 7.246 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
